data.body:
R2/b080 IMPLEMENTED + committed as 2-commit stack on calib/6982-r2:
- commit1 9742526b6 (Change-Id I9186484f): pre-register + self-gate detector (dormant helper + lexicon in det_floor, workflow_ops single-source, frozen corpus 3091 items, harness, eval.json PASS). Ancestor of commit2.
- commit2 31ec9df22: activate lint in p6_ac_quality (advisory) + table-driven tests + docs/plan-review-gate.md.
Gates all green: ruff+format PASS, mypy PASS, targeted pytest (det/plan_review/criteria/workflow_ops/a8e5) 504 passed, module-size gate OK (det_floor allowlisted; new files <800). Self-gate: precision 92.2% (64-item census, gate>=70), flag rate 2.07% (gate<=5), recall 61.3%, 115b+8c4f fire. Plan-review PASSED (1 advisory G7 re parent's stale criteria_routing.json rationale — corrected via comment on 6982). Pushing to Gerrit refs/for/main.
